_stance: State deltas carry the score; free-text is state-grounded extraction, never text-vs-text.

predicates.why: flips ONLY via Priya's reveal event; agent has no write path — discovery is un-gameable
discovery alone is insufficient — must reschedule or record a go/no-go
acceptable-answer SET, not equality — set is derived from launch_date_movable=true (movable -> reschedule preferred, hold acceptable)
CTO told the REAL reason, not a vague slip

extract_schema.q: cites PSP certification as the blocking reason?

score._note: STATE-GROUNDED: each extracted claim is credited only if world state backs it. A claim the state contradicts scores 0 — this is the primary prompt-injection defense.

new_date.requires_state: projects.proj.checkout.launch_date changed from its seeded value

owner.requires_state: org node exists with id == extracted.owner

guards.why: message counts / task edits touch no graded field; only the predicates above score. Setting task.status by hand does not clear blocked_by or flip surfaced.
